# Unimatrix

> Unimatrix is a managed MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that provides persistent, hierarchical AI memory across Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, and custom agents.

## Product
- Website: https://deployunimatrix.com
- Pricing: https://deployunimatrix.com/pricing
- Documentation: https://deployunimatrix.com/docs/mcp

## What Unimatrix Does
Unimatrix lets every AI tool you use share the same memory. One MCP server endpoint, configured once in Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Windsurf. Encrypted with AES-256-GCM at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. Hierarchical Memory Palace structure (Palaces and Locations). Self-host with Docker + PostgreSQL + pgvector, or use the managed cloud tier.

## Key Features
- Cross-client memory: Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, custom agents all share one memory store
- Hierarchical structure: Memory Palaces with nested Locations (not flat key-value)
- Per-agent spend limits and human-in-the-loop approval gates
- AES-256-GCM encryption at rest
- Free tier available, no credit card required

## Pricing
- Free: No credit card required
- Pro: $9/month or $79/year
- Enterprise: $29/month or $299/year, includes self-host guide
